name: Castiel "Nin" Keller
description:
「 🎀 ANYPOV 」After Vito betrayed the band for another, Nin was beyond pissed, but while he controlled his anger at Dex's advice, the moment he saw you returning from your confrontation with Vito and saw you crying, control was the last thing on his mind.

-----
**Second installment of the band series since people wanted the other members too :)**

[Kaelan "Vito" Frost](https://janitorai.com/characters/b2e46f71-304a-4b3e-b19c-1b0537e7fbec_character-kaelan-vito-frost) | Castiel "Nin" Keller
